vocab.meaning: khả năng cảm thụ thẩm mỹ
vocab.example: Being an artist would allow me to refine my aesthetic sensibilities and appreciate the subtle beauty in everyday objects.

vocab.meaning: phá vỡ những giới hạn thông thường
vocab.example: I believe it would be exhilarating to create boundary-pushing installations that challenge the audience's perceptions.
As an artist, I would focus on visual storytelling to convey complex emotions without needing a single word.

vocab.meaning: một công việc mang tính đơn độc
vocab.example: Although art is often a solitary pursuit, the deep introspection involved is what makes it so fascinating to me.
The prospect of creating something that has a profound impact on a stranger's life is a very compelling reason to be an artist.

vocab.meaning: sự sáng tạo không giới hạn/không bị kiềm chế
vocab.example: The life of an artist appeals to me because it offers the chance for unbridled creativity, far removed from corporate bureaucracy.

vocab.meaning: một tác phẩm gợi cảm xúc mạnh mẽ
vocab.example: It would be incredibly rewarding to produce an evocative piece of art that lingers in the minds of the viewers long after they leave the gallery.
Many are drawn to the arts because it provides a unique opportunity to leave a legacy that outlasts their own lifetime.

vocab.meaning: sự tay nghề/kỹ năng chế tác tỉ mỉ
vocab.example: I have a great deal of respect for the meticulous craftsmanship required to master traditional oil painting.
Digital art has become a revolutionary medium of expression, blending technology with classical artistic principles.
